user_query: what is the remote work policy?
final_answer_preview:
I used the intranet to locate the policy and retrieved the full text.

Remote Work Policy 2025 (last updated 2025-01-10):
Create IT supports a hybrid-first work model. Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week. Home office equipment budget: €500 one-time, €100/year recurring. Team anchor days (mandatory in-office): Tuesday and Thursday. International remote work allowed for up to 30 days/y
